zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Matthew Whitfield於1388年出生在英國諾圖波藍德懷特菲爾德時，他的父親MATTHEW de WHITFIELD25歲，母親Alice Mitford20歲。他於1420年與Agnes Ogle在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1491年在英國享年103歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Matthew Whitfield于1388年出生在英国諾圖波藍德懷特菲爾德时，他的父亲MATTHEW de WHITFIELD25岁，母亲Alice Mitford20岁。他于1420年与Agnes Ogle在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1491年在英国享年103岁。

nameMeanings.name: Whitfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Whitfield, for example in Derbyshire, Gloucestershire, Kent, Northamptonshire, and Northumberland, or Whitefield in Lancashire and the Isle of Wight, named with Old English hwīt ‘white’ + feld ‘open country’, probably because of their chalky soil.

History: Henry Whitfield (1597–c. 1657), preacher and scholar, came from Mortlake, Surrey, England (now part of Greater London) to New Haven, CT, in 1639 and was one of the first settlers in Guilford, CT. He had ten children, some of whom he left in CT when he returned to England in 1650, where he died.

variants.name: Whitfill
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Whitfield  .

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Matthew Whitfield was born in 1388, in Whitfield, Northumberland, England, his father, MATTHEW de WHITFIELD, was 25 and his mother, Alice Mitford, was 20. He married Agnes Ogle in 1420, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1491, in England, at the age of 103.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Matthew Whitfield est né en 1388, à Whitfield, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, MATTHEW de WHITFIELD, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Mitford, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Ogle en 1420, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1491, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 103 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Matthew Whitfield 1388 in Whitfield, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater MATTHEW de WHITFIELD 25 und seine Mutter Alice Mitford 20. Er hat 1420 in England, United Kingdom Agnes Ogle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1491 im Alter von 103 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Matthew Whitfield è nato il nel 1388 nel Whitfield, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, MATTHEW de WHITFIELD, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alice Mitford, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Ogle nel 1420, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1491, nel England, all'età di 103 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Matthew Whitfieldが1388年にイギリスノースウンバーランドウィトフィールドで生まれた時，父MATTHEW de WHITFIELDは25歳，母Alice Mitfordは20歳であった。1420年にイギリスイギリスでAgnes Ogleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1491年にイギリスで103歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Matthew Whitfield(이)가 1388년 영국 노르스벌랜드 휘트필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 MATTHEW de WHITFIELD(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Mitford(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Agnes Ogle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1491년 영국에서 103세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Matthew Whitfield nasceu em 1388, em Whitfield, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, MATTHEW de WHITFIELD, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice Mitford, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Ogle em 1420, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1491, em Inglaterra, com 103 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Matthew Whitfield родился в 1388 г. в местности уитфиелд, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени MATTHEW de WHITFIELD было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Mitford, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Ogle в 1420 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1491 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 103 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Matthew Whitfield nació en 1388, en Whitfield, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, MATTHEW de WHITFIELD, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alice Mitford, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Agnes Ogle en 1420, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1491, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 103 años.
